auth.signInMessage: Sign in to continue your fitness journey
auth.signupSuccess: Sign up successful! Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.signupError: Sign up error. Please try again.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

home.title: Transform Your Body with
home.subtitle: Personalized workouts, intelligent progression tracking, and comprehensive fitness analytics. Your complete fitness companion combining the best of strength training and bodyweight exercises.
home.featuresSubtitle: Powerful features designed to accelerate your fitness progress
home.smartWorkoutsDesc: AI-powered workout plans tailored to your fitness level, goals, and available equipment
home.progressTrackingDesc: Comprehensive analytics tracking your strength gains, body measurements, and personal records
home.adaptiveProgrammingDesc: Intelligent progression that adapts to your performance and automatically adjusts difficulty

dashboard.readyMessage: Ready to push your fitness goals today?
dashboard.nutritionHubPlanDesc: Review your plan and today's macros
dashboard.nutritionHubEmptyDesc: Activate nutrition with a plan and daily logging
dashboard.getStartedDesc: Follow these steps to get started
dashboard.stepOneDesc: Get familiar with the available exercises
dashboard.stepTwoDesc: Use our AI to create a personalized workout
dashboard.stepThreeDesc: Complete workouts and log your metrics
dashboard.stepFourDesc: Generate a weekly plan or log today's meals
dashboard.remindersDesc: Choose what should reactivate you and at what time without leaving the dashboard.
dashboard.reminderPreviewTitle: What we would remind you today
dashboard.reminderPreviewWorkout: You have a pending workout or a plan ready to run.
dashboard.reminderPreviewNutrition: You still need to close today's nutrition logging.
dashboard.reminderPreviewWeekly: It is worth reviewing your week and deciding the next adjustment.
dashboard.reminderPreviewReactivation: Your recent pace suggests a reactivation nudge.
dashboard.reminderPreviewNone: Your current setup does not need any extra nudge today.
dashboard.nudgesDesc: Small actions prioritized from your real current state.
dashboard.nudgesEmpty: There are no active nudges right now.
dashboard.nudgeOnboardingBody: Key data is still missing to fine-tune workouts, nutrition, and tracking.
dashboard.nudgeWorkoutTitle: You need a useful session, not a perfect one
dashboard.nudgeWorkoutBody: You already have a workout ready and you are still below your weekly target.
dashboard.nudgeNutritionTitle: Your nutrition log still needs to be closed
dashboard.nudgeNutritionBody: Without daily logging, the plan loses adjustment power and adherence support.
dashboard.nudgeWeeklyTitle: It is worth reviewing your week
dashboard.nudgeWeeklyBody: Your progress needs a small adjustment before repeating the same pattern.
dashboard.nudgeReactivationTitle: It is time to regain momentum
dashboard.nudgeReactivationBody: The app detects a recent activity drop. It is worth returning with one small concrete action.
dashboard.nudgeReasonOnboarding: {{count}} fields are still missing to close the profile.
dashboard.nudgeReasonWorkout: You have completed {{done}} sessions in 7 days versus a target of {{target}}.
dashboard.nudgeReasonNutrition: There are no meals logged yet today.
dashboard.nudgeReasonWeeklyHigh: There are signs of stagnation despite decent adherence.
dashboard.nudgeReasonWeeklyLow: The week is below the planned target.
dashboard.nudgeReasonReactivation: There are no recent workouts and nutrition logging has also dropped.

workouts.title: Workout Generator
workouts.recommendationSummary: This routine does not come from a blind generator: it uses your goal, adherence, and recent signals.

nutrition.recommendationSummary: The nutrition plan uses your goal, recent consistency, and the adjustment level most likely to protect adherence.

admin.title: Admin Content
admin.restrictedDesc: Restricted access. Configure your email in `ADMIN_EMAILS` to use this surface.
admin.subtitle: Internal panel to review editorial quality for exercises, recipes, and adoption signals.
admin.loadError: Could not load the editorial panel.
admin.eventsDesc: Active signals to measure adoption and recent usage.
admin.eventsEmpty: There are not enough events yet to analyze adoption.
admin.exerciseQueueDesc: Review quality, spot gaps, and fix the weakest pieces directly.
admin.recipeQueueDesc: Detect weak recipes and improve copy, steps, macros, and tags.
admin.exerciseEditorDesc: Adjust description and instructions for the selected exercise.
admin.recipeEditorDesc: Adjust description, instructions, difficulty, macros, and tags for the selected recipe.
admin.selectExercise: Select an exercise to edit it.
admin.selectRecipe: Select a recipe to edit it.
